able for download Restore December 22, 2017, at 06:29 pm by Christopher Brooks - Added lines 1-28: (:title CapeCode0.1.devel Release:) December 21, 2017: CapeCode0.1.devel is available for download. CapeCode is a development environment and host for

apeCode is a development environment and host for applications that use accessors, described at http://accessors.org. CapeCode provides a block diagram editor for prototyping IoT applications and code generators for deploying those applications on ot

generators for deploying those applications on other accessor hosts. CapeCode is a configuration of Ptolemy II . Downloads Quick start: Install Java 8 (not Java 9) and choose: Mac : capecode0.1.devel.setup.mac.app.tar.gz Linux : capecode0.1.devel.se

.setup.mac.app.tar.gz Linux : capecode0.1.devel.setup.linux.tar.gz Windows : capecode0_1_devel_setup_windows.exe Source : capecode0.1.devel.src.tar.gz Below are details: Description (:include PtolemyII#CapeCodeDescriptionStart#CapeCodeDescriptionEnd:

I#CapeCodeDescriptionStart#CapeCodeDescriptionEnd:) Download Rather than using the prebuilt installers below, we suggest Setting up CapeCode using SVN . (:include PtolemyII#PrebuiltStart#PrebuiltEnd:) http://capecode.org CapeCode License Restore Edit
